memoryArtifacts.headline:
Rowland Clarke
(about 1522 – March 1580)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Rowland Clark was born in Banham, Norfolk, England before 1530. 

His parents were Robert and Alice Clark of Banham. 

He married Margaret Mickelwood, sister of his brother Thomas’ wife, about 1553, p …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rowland Clarke於1525年出生在英國諾福爾可班納姆時，他的父親Robert Williamson Clarke36歲，母親Alice Mack35歲。他於大約1550年與Margaret Martha Micklewood在英國諾福爾可班納姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1580年3月在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可班納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rowland Clarke于1525年出生在英国諾福爾可班納姆时，他的父亲Robert Williamson Clarke36岁，母亲Alice Mack35岁。他于大约1550年与Margaret Martha Micklewood在英国諾福爾可班納姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1580年3月在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可班納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Rowland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roland  , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Roland
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + land ‘land, territory’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In Old French literature it is borne by a legendary Frankish hero, a vassal of Charlemagne, whose exploits are told in the Chanson de Roland. The subject of the poem is Roland's death at the Battle of Roncesvalles in the Pyrenees in 778 , while protecting the rearguard of the Frankish army on its retreat from Spain. Roland is depicted in literature and legend as headstrong and impulsive. His devoted friendship with the prudent Oliver is also legendary.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Rowland Clarke was born in 1525, in Banham, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert Williamson Clarke, was 36 and his mother, Alice Mack, was 35. He married Margaret Martha Micklewood about 1550, in Banham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died in March 1580, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Banham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rowland Clarke est né en 1525, à Banham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Williamson Clarke, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice Mack, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Martha Micklewood environ 1550, à Banham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en mars 1580, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Banham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rowland Clarke 1525 in Banham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Williamson Clarke 36 und seine Mutter Alice Mack 35. Er hat um 1550 in Banham, Norfolk, England Margaret Martha Micklewood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb im März 1580 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Banham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rowland Clarke è nato il nel 1525 nel Banham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Williamson Clarke, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alice Mack, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Martha Micklewood circa 1550, nel Banham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1580, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Banham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Rowland Clarkeが1525年にイギリスノーフォルクバンハムで生まれた時，父Robert Williamson Clarkeは36歳，母Alice Mackは35歳であった。約1550年にイギリスノーフォルクバンハムでMargaret Martha Micklewoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1580年3月に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクバンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rowland Clarke(이)가 1525년 영국 노르폴크 반함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Williamson Clarke(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Mack(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1550년 영국 노르폴크 반함에서 Margaret Martha Micklewood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1580년 3월 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 반함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rowland Clarke nasceu em 1525, em Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Williamson Clarke, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice Mack, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Martha Micklewood aproximadamente 1550, em Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em março de 1580, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rowland Clarke родился в 1525 г. в местности банам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Williamson Clarke было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Mack, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Martha Micklewood около 1550 г. в местности банам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер марта 1580 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности банам, норфолк, Англия.
